# Tezacaftor 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tezacaftor 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tezacaftor</strong> 目前有 <strong>21 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tezacaftor 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Kaftrio tablets are indicated in a combination regimen with ivacaftor for the treatment of cystic fibrosis (CF) in patients aged 6 years and older who have at least one non-Class I mutation in the...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.2%）</li>
<li>leprosy（99.1%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（99.1%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（99.0%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（98.8%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.7%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（98.4%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（98.3%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（98.3%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（98.1%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（98.1%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（98.0%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（98.0%）</li>
<li>oral candidiasis（97.9%）</li>
<li>collagenopathy（97.9%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（97.9%）</li>
<li>Mills syndrome（97.9%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（97.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/tezacaftor/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
